sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95826" key="speirodrakonto/zwnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπειρο-δρᾰκοντόζωνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n95826.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">girt with coils of snakes, An.Ox.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.182</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
